description_long: This is a square picnic table with a dark, wood-textured tabletop supported by a single central pedestal leg. The tabletop features subtle horizontal grooves and a slightly beveled edge, giving it a modern, robust appearance. The pedestal leg is thick and sturdy, connecting to a wide, stepped rectangular base that provides stability. There are visible stains and marks on the tabletop, suggesting frequent outdoor use. The table lacks attached benches, indicating it is designed for use with separate seating. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban outdoor environments.
description: A square, dark wood-textured picnic table with a central pedestal leg and a wide, stepped base, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop, central pedestal, and wide base, with visible grooves and a faint stain on the left.
description_view_1: Opposite side view with a prominent dark stain and a circular mark on the tabletop, highlighting surface wear.
description_view_2: Side view with a clean tabletop, showing the thickness of the tabletop and the solid pedestal connection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a faint stain on the left side of the tabletop, otherwise similar to view 2.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a single, thick central pedestal leg that connects to a wide, stepped rectangular base for stability.
